\tzpentry{ID5500}{Curvature Expansion}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5500 introduces Curvature Expansion as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} e^{i\kappa\sin(\omega_m t)}=\sum_{n\in\Z}J_n(\kappa)e^{in\omega_m t}, \label{eq:jacobi_anger} \end{equation}
